web_results.title: 2026 Iran–United States crisis - Wikipedia
web_results.description: One source, however, cautioned that Trump had privately argued both for and against military action and, polling advisers and allies on what the best course of action is. On 19 February 2026, according to reports The US could launch military strikes on Iran within days as the White House issued ...

web_results.title: 2026 Israeli–United States strikes on Iran - Wikipedia
web_results.description: On 6 February 2026, Iran and the US held indirect nuclear negotiations in Oman's capital, Muscat. Iran emphasized that progress depends on consultations back in capitals. A second round of nuclear talks is scheduled in Geneva. During 15 to 20 February, Iran increased its oil export to 3 times normal rate, and reduced oil storage. Just before the strikes began, on 27 February 2026, Oman's Foreign Minister Badr Al-Busaidi said a "breakthrough" had been reached and Iran had agreed both to never stockpile enriched uranium and to full verification by the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA); further Iran had agreed to irreversibly downgrade its current enriched uranium to "the lowest level possible".

web_results.title: Iran Update, February 26, 2026 | ISW
web_results.description: US officials have previously stated that the US would strike Iran if the two sides cannot reach a deal.[1] The United States and Iran held a third round of nuclear talks on February 26 in Geneva, Switzerland.[2] Omani Foreign Affairs Minister ...

web_results.title: Iran Update Special Report: US and Israeli Strikes, February 28, 2026
web_results.description: Iran has responded immediately to the US and Israeli strikes. Iran has launched multiple barrages at Israel in recent hours. An Israeli media correspondent reported that Iran had launched around 35 missiles at Israel as of 5:42 AM ET. Iran has also attacked numerous US bases across the region. Iran has attacked US bases in Bahrain, Qatar, the United Arab Emirates, Kuwait, Jordan, and Saudi Arabia. This update is the first of multiple Iran Updates that ISW-CTP will publish over the next 24 hours.

news_results.title: Live: Iran confirms supreme leader Khamenei is dead after US, Israeli attacks | Reuters
news_results.description: The United States and Israel launched the most ambitious attack on Iran in decades on Saturday, and Iranian state media has confirmed Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei had been killed.

news_results.title: Iran Update, February 26, 2026 | ISW
news_results.description: Iran is unlikely to accept reported US demands to destroy its nuclear facilities and commit to a permanent deal.

news_results.title: 'Bigger ramifications than Venezuela': Markets brace for impact after U.S. strikes Iran
news_results.description: Investors are bracing for impact after the U.S.'s attacks on Iran, a move they see as carrying far larger market consequences than the Venezuela campaign.

news_results.title: What we know about the US-Israeli attack on Iran and Tehran’s retaliation | CNN
news_results.description: The United States and Israel have launched a major attack on Iran, which President Donald Trump said would lay waste to the country’s military, obliterate its military program, and could even topple its regime.

news_results.title: What to know about the U.S.-Israel attacks on Iran | PBS News
news_results.description: The strikes came two days after the latest U.S.-Iran talks as Trump had pressured Tehran for a deal to constrain its nuclear program, building up a fleet of American warships in the region.
